---
title: "Rise of the Machines: A Computable General Equilbrium Analysis of the Sectoral Level Impacts of Artificial Intelligence (AI) aross the Global Economy"
subtitle: "Note: No AI was used to write this paper"
format: pdf
bibliography: references.bib
author:
    - Maros Ivanic
    - Jayson Beckman
abstract : "There is no bigger topic in economics right now than the potential impacts from Artificial Intelligence (AI). And there no greater need in economic modeling than to operationalize AI within economic frameworks. This paper incorporates AI in computable general equilibrium model by allowing the possibility to substitute labor for AI. Results indicate that"

highlights: "We operationalize AI in a widely used CGE model. Results indicate that." 
crossref:
  appendix-title: "App."
  appendix-delim: ":" 
---

{{< include introduction.qmd >}}

{{< include model.qmd >}}

{{< include scenario.qmd >}}

{{< include data.qmd >}}

{{< include results.qmd >}}

{{< include conclusion.qmd >}}

{{< include appendix.qmd >}}

\newpage

# Bibliography
